name: Cul-de-sac at West end of Hickory
description: I'm in a Cul-de-sac at West end of Hickory
hints: A cul-de-sac at the west end of Hickory with another large house.
GO HOUSE to enter this house. It may have different contents than the east house.
GO HOUSE to explore inside. EAST returns to Hickory Ave (room 7) near the antenna shed.
notes: West end cul-de-sac on Hickory Ave. GO HOUSE enters the large house (living room, room 16). EAST returns to Hickory Ave (room 7).
